summary: Iteration 185: Varianti (Montaggio), Attrezzature (Scadenzario), Archivio Storico. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: MontaggioPanel shows 5 sub-steps (DDT, SERRAGGIO, VARIANTI, CANTIERE, FIRMA), VariantiSection has description textarea, mandatory photo button, save button, and existing varianti list. Routes /attrezzature and /archivio-storico exist in App.js with sidebar navigation links.
critical_code_review_comments: montaggio.py: Variante endpoint correctly validates mandatory foto_doc_id and descrizione fields
montaggio.py: Returns 400 with clear Italian error messages for validation failures
attrezzature.py: All CRUD endpoints properly require authentication (401 without auth)
attrezzature.py: check-taratura endpoint creates admin alerts for expired calibrations
archivio.py: Export endpoint generates ZIP with organized folder structure (Year/Client/Commessa)
archivio.py: Stats endpoint returns available years and clients for filter UI
MontaggioPanel.js: STEPS array correctly includes 5 sub-steps with icons
VariantiSection.js: Form has mandatory photo upload with visual feedback (green when uploaded)
VariantiSection.js: Existing varianti displayed with operator name and date
SerraggioSection.js: Taratura alert check calls /api/attrezzature/check-taratura with credentials
AttrezzaturePage.js: Equipment list with calibration status badges (scaduta/in_scadenza/valida)
ArchivioStoricoPage.js: Stats display, year/client filters, and export button
DashboardLayout.js: 'Scadenzario Attrezzature' under Certificazioni group, 'Archivio Storico' under Impostazioni
App.js: Routes /attrezzature and /archivio-storico with ProtectedRoute wrapper
seed_data_creation: Created test varianti during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 185 added 3 new features: (1) Varianti in MontaggioPanel - public endpoint at /api/montaggio/variante with mandatory photo, (2) Attrezzature - admin-only CRUD at /api/attrezzature with calibration tracking and alerts, (3) Archivio Storico - admin-only export at /api/archivio/export generating ZIP files. The Varianti endpoint is public (worker access), while Attrezzature and Archivio require admin auth.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/montaggio/variante: ✓ Creates variante with mandatory foto_doc_id and descrizione (200)

MontaggioPanel.5_substeps: ✓ DDT, SERRAGGIO, VARIANTI, CANTIERE, FIRMA all visible

VariantiSection.descrizione: ✓ Textarea with placeholder 'Descrivi la variante rispetto al progetto originale...'

SerraggioSection.taratura_alert: ⚠ Not visible (no expired calibrations for test user)

routes./attrezzature: ✓ Route exists in App.js with ProtectedRoute
routes./archivio-storico: ✓ Route exists in App.js with ProtectedRoute
